title: oleandra micrantha
intro: Oleandra micrantha, also known as Elephant Ear or Fishbone Fern, is a species of plant in the family Blechnaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Asian medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and aiding in digestion. Oleandra micrantha can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
